response.overview: Super-collector Jay Bartlett is back on the hunt—but this time the challenge is extreme. He has just 14 days to track down all 296 Nintendo 64 games, with no online purchases and only $20,000 at his disposal. The mission? Secure a full set, then auction it off with 100% of the proceeds benefiting Alzheimer’s research. Along the way, his lifelong best friend Rob documents the quest while uncovering the untold story of Nintendo’s most fascinating console—its risks, its myths, and its legacy.  Are you game?
response.title: Nintendo 64 Quest
